TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_abas

S.FORM: pakunku pa iku tu zana mqi byabas ya lazat a yau.
S.TRANSL: 我要說關於採芭樂的故事。
I’m going to tell a story about a person picking guavas.

S.FORM: wi mzaqis a lazat a yau mqibyabas nani.
S.TRANSL: The person climbed up to pick guavas.

S.FORM: uzusa ti qanas ni kyalaan na lazat a yau mzaqis tu byabas nani.
S.TRANSL: 爬的那個人已經摘了兩籃芭樂。
The person who climbed up had picked two baskets of guavas.

S.FORM: mangu yau mlaziw ay ya mqaqaytun nani.
S.TRANSL: There was a person passing by. He rode a bike.

S.FORM: wiya ti isisanna ya usiq qanas.
pizianna ti ta qaytunanna.
S.TRANSL: He put it on the bike.

S.FORM: wiya ti m RaRiw ya ‘nay qaRuziq ay.
Raynguan na lazat a yau na wi mzaqis kmyala tu byabas a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個爬上去採芭樂的人不知道。
The person that climbed up to pick guavas didn’t know (this).

S.FORM: mangu simqatabun kinawsa saiza ya.
S.TRANSL: Finally, the two collided with each other.

S.FORM: mqaqaytun.
m suRaw ti ya yau a.
mqi Ruziq ay tu byabas a yau tu usiq qanas nani.
S.TRANSL: The one who stole guavas ... a basket.

S.FORM: mRusal ti ya byabus a yau qaniyau Ruziqanna na lazat a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那個人偷的芭樂散落了。
The guavas stolen by that person were scattered.

S.FORM: sapunanna ti.
tu naquni smani nani.
iwaliw ti mai tu e qaytun.
S.TRANSL: It turned out that there was no bike.

S.FORM: mai ti ya ni alaanna tu qanas a yau tu byabus a yau nani.
pameng ti pasasani smani nani.
tuRuzna nani yau a izau ya lazat a yau smaRuR ti.
ya matiw mqibyabas nizi tababaw na na paRin nani.
S.TRANSL: He went down from the tree.

S.FORM: yau ti tmayta tu qanasna na mai ti tu simpez a usiq.
S.TRANSL: He looked at the basket. There was nothing.

S.FORM: e? mana mai ti tu simpez a usiq ka.
zinna saiza na lazat a yau nawiz babaw mqibyabas nani.
S.TRANSL: 從上面採芭樂的那個人想。
The person picking guavas up the tree was thinking.

S.FORM: nayau a lanas na.
tu ma mdiyas nani unay sanpipiRas ti ya lazat a yau a maw msuRaw.
e m qaqaytun mala ta byabas a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: (He) rode the bike and took the guavas.

S.FORM: oh aisu haw ya mala tu qenaalaku tu byabas.
zinna na lazat a yau nani.
naRin mai ti mtayta ya qenaalaanna tu niqiRuziqna tu byabas a yau.
S.TRANSL: (He) didn’t see him steal the guavas.

S.FORM: mai ti mtayta ya ya qanas a yau.
ya niqiRuziqna.
nayau a ya pakunkuan nayau.
